notes: Pinned ratchet floors that must not regress. The contract_test_count metric is the static declaration count produced by scripts/audit.mjs::countTests (matches /^\s*(it|test)\(/gm across git-tracked tests/**/*.test.* files), not the vitest runtime total; the audit uses the static count so the ratchet is deterministic without shelling into vitest. Advancement is an explicit commit action; HEAD~1 moving-window comparison is insufficient (docs-only commits between regression and audit would hide the regression). Close gates depend on this file, not on HEAD~1 alone. See specs/plans/phase-1-close-revised.md §Slice 26b and ADR-0002 Addendum A. Initial floor 574 pins post-Slice-26b (post-Codex-fold-in) HEAD static count — per Codex HIGH-1 fold-in on the Slice 26b diff, pinning below the post-slice count leaves the moving-window hole open (trivial revert of the new test file drops HEAD back to the floor and Check 19 stays green). Metadata fields (schema_version, last_advanced_at, last_advanced_in_slice) are audit-enforced via validatePinnedRatchetFloorData; floor zero or negative is rejected (Codex HIGH-2 fold-in). Future slices raise the floor only as an explicit ratchet-advance act.
